column1: # Expanded Mathlib kernel trace probe set.
# This set is intended for broader pre-Mathlib verification than the smoke set,
# while still staying much cheaper than full Mathlib kernel verification.
# It avoids known source-metadata-only mismatch targets; keep those in ad hoc
# investigations unless we add a separate expected-mismatch manifest.
# Bool decidability and finite case analysis
# Algebraic class projections and monoid/group rewrites
# Currently disabled because the deterministic Lean source trace exits before
# producing target events in this local Mathlib checkout. Fin equality is still
# covered by the Lean4 Init manifest.
